name: BMF
description: Boolean matrix factorization

name: BicliqueCover
description: Cover bipartite edges with k bicliques

name: BinPacking
description: Assign items to bins minimizing number of bins used, subject to capacity

fields.name: sizes
fields.description: Item sizes s_i for each item

name: CircuitSAT
description: Find satisfying input to a boolean circuit

name: ClosestVectorProblem
description: Find the closest lattice point to a target vector

fields.name: basis
fields.description: Basis matrix B as column vectors

name: ExactCoverBy3Sets
description: Determine if a collection of 3-element subsets contains an exact cover

fields.name: universe_size
fields.description: Size of universe X (must be divisible by 3)

fields.name: subsets
fields.description: Collection C of 3-element subsets of X

name: Factoring
description: Factor a composite integer into two factors

name: FlowShopScheduling
description: Determine if a flow-shop schedule for jobs on m processors meets a deadline

fields.name: task_lengths
fields.description: task_lengths[j][i] = length of job j's task on machine i

name: GraphPartitioning
description: Find minimum cut balanced bisection of a graph

name: HamiltonianPath
description: Find a Hamiltonian path in a graph

name: ILP
description: Optimize linear objective subject to linear constraints

name: IsomorphicSpanningTree
description: Does graph G contain a spanning tree isomorphic to tree T?

fields.name: tree
fields.description: The target tree T (must be a tree with |V(T)| = |V(G)|)

name: KColoring
description: Find valid k-coloring of a graph

name: KSatisfiability
description: SAT with exactly k literals per clause

fields.name: clauses
fields.description: Clauses each with exactly K literals

name: Knapsack
description: Select items to maximize total value subject to weight capacity constraint

name: LongestCommonSubsequence
description: Find the longest string that is a subsequence of every input string

name: MaxCut
description: Find maximum weight cut in a graph

name: MaximalIS
description: Find maximum weight maximal independent set

name: MaximumClique
description: Find maximum weight clique in a graph

name: MaximumIndependentSet
description: Find maximum weight independent set in a graph

name: MaximumMatching
description: Find maximum weight matching in a graph

name: MaximumSetPacking
description: Find maximum weight collection of disjoint sets

fields.name: sets
fields.description: Collection of sets over a universe

name: MinimumDominatingSet
description: Find minimum weight dominating set in a graph

name: MinimumFeedbackArcSet
description: Find minimum weight feedback arc set in a directed graph

name: MinimumFeedbackVertexSet
description: Find minimum weight feedback vertex set in a directed graph

name: MinimumSetCovering
description: Find minimum weight collection covering the universe

name: MinimumSumMulticenter
description: Find K centers minimizing total weighted distance (p-median problem)

name: MinimumTardinessSequencing
description: Schedule unit-length tasks with precedence constraints and deadlines to minimize the number of tardy tasks

fields.name: deadlines
fields.description: Deadline d(t) for each task (1-indexed finish time)

name: MinimumVertexCover
description: Find minimum weight vertex cover in a graph

name: OptimalLinearArrangement
description: Find a vertex ordering on a line with total edge length at most K

fields.name: bound
fields.description: Upper bound K on total edge length

name: PaintShop
description: Minimize color changes in paint shop sequence

fields.name: sequence
fields.description: Car labels (each must appear exactly twice)

name: PartitionIntoTriangles
description: Partition vertices into triangles (K3 subgraphs)

fields.name: graph
fields.description: The underlying graph G=(V,E) with |V| divisible by 3

name: QUBO
description: Minimize quadratic unconstrained binary objective

name: RuralPostman
description: Find a circuit covering required edges with total length at most B (Rural Postman Problem)

fields.name: edge_weights
fields.description: Edge lengths l(e) for each e in E

fields.name: required_edges
fields.description: Edge indices of the required subset E' ⊆ E

fields.name: bound
fields.description: Upper bound B on total circuit length

name: Satisfiability
description: Find satisfying assignment for CNF formula

name: ShortestCommonSupersequence
description: Find a common supersequence of bounded length for a set of strings

fields.name: strings
fields.description: Input strings over the alphabet {0, ..., alphabet_size-1}

fields.name: bound
fields.description: Bound on supersequence length (configuration has exactly this many symbols)

name: SpinGlass
description: Minimize Ising Hamiltonian on a graph

name: SteinerTree
description: Find minimum weight tree connecting terminal vertices

fields.name: terminals
fields.description: Terminal vertices T that must be connected

name: SubgraphIsomorphism
description: Determine if host graph G contains a subgraph isomorphic to pattern graph H

fields.name: graph
fields.description: The host graph G = (V_1, E_1) to search in

fields.name: pattern
fields.description: The pattern graph H = (V_2, E_2) to find as a subgraph

name: SubsetSum
description: Find a subset of positive integers that sums to exactly a target value

fields.name: sizes
fields.description: Positive integer sizes s(a) for each element

name: TravelingSalesman
description: Find minimum weight Hamiltonian cycle in a graph (Traveling Salesman Problem)
